summary: Think your PF is 100% safe? Think again. 😬 In this highlight from This or That Podcast, Bhartendra Singh talks with Ketan Das - @FinRight about the shocking realities behind EPF (Employee Provident Fund), and how your hard-earned money can actually get stuck in the system.

seo.title: How Your PF Actually Gets Stuck (And What To Do About It)
seo.description: Think your PF is 100% safe? Think again. 😬 In this highlight from This or That Podcast, Bhartendra Singh talks with Ketan Das - @FinRight about the

takeaways: EPF is not as automatically safe as most salaried people assume, and withdrawals get rejected more often than you would expect.
Your PF money can quietly fail to reflect or transfer during a job switch, leaving it effectively stuck in the system.
The idea that EPF interest stops once you leave a job, or after three years, is a myth the episode clears up.
Most PF trouble traces back to small mistakes made during job changes, like not transferring or consolidating old accounts.
Consolidating your PF into one account and keeping it trackable is the simplest way to avoid money getting stuck later.
